name: edgar_search
description:
Search SEC EDGAR for company filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, etc.). No API key required.

Recommended two-step workflow:
1. First call with ticker + form_type to browse available filings
2. Second call with ticker + form_type + fetch_content=true to get actual filing text for analysis

The fetch_content option returns ~15K chars of the filing document, which includes business descriptions, revenue breakdowns, risk factors, and other substantive content. Use this to extract specific data points rather than just listing filings.

query.description: Full-text search query across SEC filings (e.g., 'artificial intelligence revenue growth'). Required unless ticker is provided.

ticker.description: Company stock ticker (e.g., 'AAPL', 'MSFT', 'TSLA'). Preferred over query for targeted company research.

form_type.description: Filter by SEC form type: '10-K' (annual reports), '10-Q' (quarterly), '8-K' (current events)

max_results.description: Maximum results to return (default 5, max 10). When using fetch_content, keep low (1-2) for best content depth.

fetch_content.description: When true, fetches and returns the actual text content of each filing (~15K chars). Content includes business descriptions, financials, risk factors, etc. Best combined with ticker + form_type. Default false.
